entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The target crop for genomic selection and prediction models.

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A method of selecting lines prior to field phenotyping using genotyping data to enhance genetic gains.

entities.name: GENOTYPE X ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between genotype and environment that affects prediction accuracy in GS models.

entities.name: PREDICTION ACCURACY
entities.description: The measure of how well a model predicts the phenotype of a line.

entities.name: FIELD PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of recording phenotypic data on breeding lines in the field.

entities.name: GENETIC GAINS
entities.description: The improvement in the average performance of a population over time.

entities.name: DARTSEQ
entities.description: A genotyping platform used to identify SNPs.

entities.name: GENOTYPING-BY-SEQUENCING
entities.description: A genotyping platform (GBS) used to identify SNPs.

entities.name: SNP
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms used as markers for genotyping.

entities.name: CROSS-VALIDATION SCHEMES
entities.description: Schemes used to assess the prediction accuracy of models, including CV0, CV1, and CV2.

entities.name: CV2
entities.description: A cross-validation scheme representing incomplete field trials or sparse testing.

entities.name: CV1
entities.description: A cross-validation scheme representing newly developed lines.

entities.name: CV0
entities.description: A cross-validation scheme representing untested environments.
